title: Blaze Cobblemon
description: We host Cobblemon and Pixelmon Minecraft Pokemon Servers. Join us and find out why we've been running for over 7 years!
body:
# 🔥 Blaze Gaming – Cobblemon Done Right

Blaze Gaming is a competitive, progression-driven Pokémon Minecraft network running both **Cobblemon** and **Pixelmon** — built for players who want long-term content, balanced systems, and a real community.

We don’t run stock modpacks. We heavily customize both experiences to create structure, economy balance, and meaningful endgame goals.

---

## 🟠 Cobblemon

Our Cobblemon server focuses on modern mechanics, clean performance, and competitive depth.

**What you can expect:**
- Player-driven economy
- Competitive tournaments & seasonal resets
- Balanced spawn tuning (no inflated legendary spam)
- Quality-of-life features

---

## 🔵 Pixelmon

Our Pixelmon server is built around depth and content density.

**Features include:**
- Battle Tower systems
- Clue Scrolls & Bingo Hunts
- Gyms, Missions & Seasonal Events
- Global Boosters & Community Goals
- Custom enchantments tied into Pokémon gameplay
- Structured economy & anti-inflation balancing

Every system is designed to reward activity — catching, battling, breeding, grinding, and competing.

---

## ⚖️ How We Run Things

- Active development cycle  
- Community feedback actually implemented  

Both servers are maintained with long-term vision in mind.

---

## 🎯 Who Blaze Gaming Is For

- Competitive players  
- Long-term grinders  
- Economy-focused players  
- Pokémon PvP enthusiasts  
- Players who want structured progression instead of chaos  

If you want a server where effort matters and systems connect together, Blaze Gaming is built for that.
